stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You are flying an aircraft at FL400 along the path of the dashed line above, through the region of an active polar front depression over North-East Europe. Which of the following weather phenomena are most likely to encounter?

options.c: CB, TS, GR, moderate to severe icing and turbulence.
options.d: Embedded CB, TS, NS, +SHRA, moderate to severe icing and turbulence.
